task: v2.0_RC criterion 3 — Zeta AI A/B Likert comparison benchmark run
runtime: hexa.real arm64 (Mac local, no GPU required)

tests.T1_range: PASS — Likert in [1, 5], both endpoints reachable
tests.T2_monotonicity: PASS — all axes increasing => score increasing
tests.T6_determinism: PASS — same seed twice => identical results

layer_b_talm_p1_2.description: 20 Korean prompts x 5 categories, deterministic rubric scorer

tests.P2_score_in_range: PASS — all scores in [1.0, 5.0] including empty string
tests.P3_blind_ab_deterministic: PASS — two runs identical (anima=4.084, zeta=3.665, delta=+0.418)
tests.P4_category_coverage: PASS — daily=4, emotion=4, task=4, roleplay=4, meta=4
tests.P5_mean_calculation: PASS — manual recomputation matches blind_ab output

gate_assessment.real_data_verdict: ALM PASS + CLM PASS (30 pairs, diff=+1.37, p<0.001)
blocking_items: Current responses use stub/template responses (anima_response is identical per category)
Real ALM r5+ model responses needed to replace stubs
Zeta responses in pairs JSONL are placeholder ('eung, geuretguna') — real Zeta collection needed
Human raters should validate blind A/B at scale (>=30 independent raters recommended)
gate_assessment.overall: HARNESS_VERIFIED — framework + stats pipeline fully operational. Gate is structurally passable but awaits real model outputs and real Zeta AI responses.
